title: holosteum umbellatum f. glaberrimum
intro: Holosteum umbellatum f. glaberrimum, also known as Glabrous Penny Cress, is a subspecies of Holosteum umbellatum, a flowering plant in the cress family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Glabrous Penny Cress include its ability to help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Glabrous Penny Cress can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use.
